meta.strategy: Buy 1 VOO share on day one + 1 more every day it drops >=2%. Benchmark = the same yearly dollars invested lump-sum at each year's start (no dip-timing).

recommendation.note: VOO is +0.5% today — no 2% dip, so no buy.
Buy 1 share only if VOO closes below ~$675 (a 2% drop from today).
Historically ~0.7 down-≥2% days per month — keep adding 1 share on each.
